overall.description: Cinematic Cyberpunk 2077 game footage showcasing a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The clip transitions through three distinct views: an elevated street intersection with moving traffic, a slow orbital shot around a massive multi-armed holographic deity statue with purple and green lighting, and a ground-level walk through a pedestrian underpass featuring food vendors and illuminated cherry blossom trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city intersection with vehicle traffic

agents.ego_description: stationary elevated observation of the intersection from a high vantage point

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: tall modern building with reflective glass facade and illuminated windows
wide asphalt road with multiple lanes and crosswalk markings
large vertical digital billboard with pink neon signage
suspended traffic signal with red illumination
angular modern structure with green and gray panels

segments.scene_description: An elevated static view of a futuristic city intersection at night. Glass office towers flank the multi-lane road where futuristic vehicles drive through. Neon billboards cast pink light onto the wet asphalt below, while traffic lights hang suspended over the crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza with giant holographic deity statue

events.description: camera cuts from street intersection to aerial view of giant holographic statue
statue's green base lighting becomes more prominent as camera moves lower

agents.ego_description: slowly orbiting around the massive holographic statue to capture it from multiple angles

entered.detail: massive multi-armed humanoid figure with glowing purple skin, green robes, and energy orbs in hands
tall building facade with hexagonal pattern lighting
cluster of high-rise buildings with illuminated windows forming the city skyline
cars suspended in mid-air between buildings in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera orbits a colossal holographic deity statue standing in the city center. The figure has multiple arms holding glowing orbs, with purple and green neon illumination. Surrounding skyscrapers tower in the background while floating vehicles drift between buildings in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with food vendors and illuminated trees

events.description: camera descends from aerial statue view to ground level underpass
ambient lighting shifts from dark purple to bright pink and cyan neon

agents.ego_description: walking through the pedestrian underpass past food vendors and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark jacket walking toward the camera
pedestrian in light clothing walking away from the camera

entered.detail: wooden pagoda-style roof structure with curved eaves and red trim
futuristic food vendor stall with illuminated menu boards and serving counter
cherry blossom trees wrapped in white and pink fairy lights
concrete underside of the highway overpass creating a canopy
string of traditional red lanterns hanging from the wooden structure

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a bustling pedestrian underpass beneath the highway. A food truck serves customers in the center while pedestrians walk past. Traditional Japanese architectural elements with red paper lanterns contrast with the futuristic setting, and cherry trees glow with white lights against the night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from a high-altitude urban vista into the intimate, neon-lit depths of a pedestrian district. It begins with an elevated view of a futuristic city intersection, where glass towers flank multi-lane roads and pink neon billboards reflect off wet asphalt. The camera then glides away from the traffic to orbit a colossal holographic deity statue, shifting the focus toward purple and green illuminations as floating vehicles drift between distant skyscrapers. This sweeping motion eventually dives downward, transitioning from the open skyline into a bustling pedestrian underpass beneath the highway. The scene finally settles among food trucks and pedestrians, where traditional red paper lanterns and white-lit cherry blossom trees contrast with the surrounding cyberpunk architecture.
